subcodes.first_line: O Hushang! Hearken unto the melody of the Friend, that thine outward ear may be purified from the insinuations and doubts of the people of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هوشنگ آهنگ دوست را بشنو تا گوش ظاهر از اشارات و شبهات اهل زمین پاک و
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
